name: Oven Barbecued Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the spareribs into serving-size pieces and brown them in a heavy skillet.
2. Transfer the ribs to a foil-lined baking pan, laying them in a single layer.
3. Drain any excess fat from the skillet, leaving behind the browned particles.
4. Melt the margarine in the skillet and sauté the onions until they are brown and limp.
5. Add the remaining ingredients along with 1 cup of water to the skillet. Stir to combine.
6. Simmer for 20 minutes before pouring the mixture over the ribs.
7. Cover the pan tightly with foil and bake at 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 hours.
